newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The June 1 Siemens reference architecture for NVIDIA DSX Vera Rubin NVL72 (nVent power/cooling-aligned) and Q1 2026 results (+53% sales) were already captured in the June 9 case. The +4.59% move since prev is recovery from the June pullback, not new news.

sources.label: Insider Monkey - nVent liquid cooling AI case

verdicts.rankRationale: Power/cooling/electrical bottleneck (>2GW liquid cooling deployed, NVL72-aligned reference design) is real but fully recognized: Strong Buy consensus, $185-190 PTs. Nothing new since June 9; the June 1 Siemens/NVIDIA design and Q1 beat already priced. Hold rank 10.
verdicts.bull: Liquid-cooling + power-distribution choke-point for 800V/NVL72 racks; Avail EPG deal gives end-to-end stack.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck exposure real but consensus and PTs already reflect it.
verdicts.bear: +60% YTD and Strong Buy consensus leave little under-owned alpha.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Vera Rubin NVL72 power/cooling content per rack
